'''''Crimson Empire III''''' was a [[Holodrama/Legends|holodrama]] released in the [[Summer/Legends|summer]] of<ref name="Hnn" /> [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date" /> Prior to it's release, [[Core World Critics Association]] president [[Jaysa Namoor]] criticized the film for it's writing before she even saw it.<ref name="Hnn" />

==Behind the scenes==
This holofilm title is a reference to the real world canceled and later revived [[Star Wars: Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost|''Star Wars: Crimson Empire III'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] miniseries.
